tasks.label: Run FastAPI Development Server (Poetry, Testing)
tasks.command: set -a && . ./.env.test && set +a && ENVIRONMENT=testing poetry run uvicorn inference_core.main_factory:create_application --factory --reload --host "${HOST:-0.0.0.0}" --port "${PORT:-8100}"

tasks.label: Celery: Start Worker (Testing)
tasks.command: ENVIRONMENT=testing poetry run celery -A inference_core.celery.celery_main:celery_app worker -n test_worker@%h --pool=threads --exclude-queues=embeddings,mail --loglevel=info

tasks.label: Celery: Start Worker (Mail, Testing)
tasks.command: ENVIRONMENT=testing poetry run celery -A inference_core.celery.celery_main:celery_app worker -n test_mail@%h --queues=mail --pool=threads --loglevel=info

tasks.label: Celery: Start Worker (Embeddings, Testing)
tasks.command: ENVIRONMENT=testing poetry run celery -A inference_core.celery.celery_main:celery_app worker -n test_embeddings@%h --queues=embeddings --pool=solo --loglevel=info

tasks.label: Celery: Start Worker (DEBUG)
tasks.command: export DEBUG_CELERY=1 && poetry run celery -A inference_core.celery.celery_main:celery_app worker -n debug@%h --loglevel=info

tasks.label: Celery: Start Worker (DEBUG, Testing)
tasks.command: DEBUG_CELERY=1 ENVIRONMENT=testing poetry run celery -A inference_core.celery.celery_main:celery_app worker -n debug_test@%h --loglevel=info

tasks.label: LangGraph: Dev Server (Testing)
tasks.command: ENVIRONMENT=testing LANGGRAPH_AUTH_DISABLED=true poetry run langgraph dev --config langgraph.test.json --port 2124 --no-browser

tasks.label: LangGraph: Dev Server (with debugger, Testing)
tasks.command: ENVIRONMENT=testing LANGGRAPH_AUTH_DISABLED=true poetry run langgraph dev --config langgraph.test.json --port 2124 --no-browser --debug-port 5680
